message.content:
@startuml
actor "Project Manager" as PM
participant ":ProjectManagerUI" as UI
participant "AGVServer" as AGVS
participant "AGVServerThread" as AGVST
participant "AVGManagerController" as AM
participant "AGVDigitalTwinServer" as ADTS
participant "AGVDigitalTwinThread" as ADTT
participant "AGVDigitalTwinController" as ADTC
participant "CodingAndDecoding2" as CD

note over PM, UI: Wants to assign ready to go Orders to an AGV

PM -> UI: message
activate UI
UI -> AGVS: accept
activate AGVS
AGVS -> AGVST: start
activate AGVST
AGVST -> CD: Decoding(r)
activate CD
CD --> AGVST: Message
deactivate CD
AGVST -> AM: FifoAGV()
activate AM
AM -> AM: findavailableOrder()
loop until orderList is empty
    AM -> AM: findavailableAGV(weight,volume)
    AM -> AM: createTaskandSave(description,order,agv)
    AM -> AM: doTask()
    AM -> ADTS: message
    activate ADTS
    ADTS -> ADTS: accept
    ADTS -> ADTT: start
    activate ADTT
    ADTT -> CD: Decoding(r)
    activate CD
    CD --> ADTT: message
    deactivate CD
    ADTT -> ADTC: doTask(taskPerform)
    activate ADTC
    ADTC --> ADTT: TaskReportMessage
    deactivate ADTC
    ADTT -> ADTS: TaskReportMessage
    deactivate ADTT
    deactivate ADTS
    ADTS --> AM: TaskReportMessage
    deactivate AM
end
AM --> AGVST: ResponseMessage
deactivate AGVST
AGVST --> AGVS: ResponseMessage
deactivate AGVS
AGVS --> UI: ResponseMessage
deactivate UI
UI --> PM: Informs operation success
@enduml
